A species of '''carnivorous plant''' was [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Gungan Swamp|swamps]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Standing taller than four [[Meter/Legends|meters]], the [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] [[Plant/Legends|plants]] grew together in "[[Forest/Legends|forests]]" of each other, attempting to devour any animal unfortunate enough to get to close to them, including [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings. They had four [[Color/Legends|yellow]] leaves and a [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] on top of a stalk.

==Behind the scenes==
The plants appear in the [[2000]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]''.
